title: The Top 1% Build AI Presentations Differently. Here's How.
summary: Jeff Su demonstrates Gamma, an AI presentation tool that goes beyond first-draft generation to handle realistic stakeholder edits. The video covers seven editing scenarios including narrative reordering, live data insertion, stat verification, text-to-chart conversion, visual hierarchy fixes, slide merging, and full-deck translation.
